prevented_failure_purpose: Prevent an engineering audit from being declared complete while required native checks, current evidence, blockers, predictive conditions, or the bounded claim scope remain unresolved.

physical_or_evidence_boundary.description: Requested closure profile and required checks
Current native check, validation-depth, and predictive receipts
Current blockers, skipped checks, stale evidence, and missing inputs
physical_or_evidence_boundary.authority_source: native audit result and evidence registry
closure request and native claim boundary

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against required native check is missing
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the closure plan omits or lacks a current required PhysicsGuard check
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against stale or skipped evidence is promoted
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: stale, skipped, not-run, or foreign evidence is treated as passed
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against unresolved blocker is suppressed
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: a current native blocker or missing-input condition is absent from closure
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against predictive readiness is overclaimed
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: pointwise or non-predictive evidence is used for a predictive closure request
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

prevented_failure_classes.title: Candidate is not proven against closure scope is overreached
prevented_failure_classes.block_when: the candidate lacks current passing target-native obligation evidence for this bounded route condition: the final statement exceeds the exact checked evidence and assumptions
prevented_failure_classes.known_limit: This admission proof rejects a candidate whose governed obligation evidence is absent or native-failed; it does not detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
prevented_failure_classes.claim_boundary: This failure row licenses only rejection of a candidate that lacks current passing target-native obligation proof; it does not license a claim that the underlying domain defect was detected.

claim_boundary: This guard-model proof blocks only candidate admission when declared target-native obligation evidence is missing or native-failed. It does not independently detect the underlying physical, mapping, topology, workflow, or evidence defect and does not certify upstream truth.
